titles.title: That sounds like home to me

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Somewhere just across the Jordan River There's a place of everlasting joy and peace The tree of life is blooming there forever, And a crown of life is waiting there for me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: That sounds like home to me like where I want to be There'll be no tears to dim our eyes again The hills will echo with the story as we sing of His grace and glory Where the saints of God will be that sounds like home to me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: They say there's mansions there inside that city The crystal river flowing by the tree of life No pain, nor disappointments ever come there And Jesus Christ (our God/Himself) will be the light.
